title: HHL Algorithm: Quantum Linear System Solver
description: Master the Harrow-Hassidim-Lloyd (HHL) algorithm for solving linear systems of equations with exponential quantum speedup, including phase estimation, controlled rotations, and complexity analysis.
learningObjectives: Explain the HHL algorithm structure and its quantum speedup claims
Implement quantum phase estimation for eigenvalue extraction
Understand controlled rotation for amplitude encoding of solutions
Analyze the complexity and limitations of HHL
Identify when HHL provides quantum advantage over classical methods
